texto: First our comrades. They come from many places. Some were good Jews fighting the baddy Arabs, some were baddy Jews fighting the goody Arabs, some were good protestants fighting the baddy catholics, some were baddy protestants fighting the goody catholics, some were goody or baddy, Viet Cong, black or white, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc, etc.
explicacao: Citação de Nicholas Emmett sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “First our comrades. They come from many places. Some were good Jews fighting the baddy Arabs, som…” articula inteligencia, brains-on-the-dump, war em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e war.
